title: Vanilla Detailed Goat Horn CIT Pack
description: This pack changes the Textures of Goat Horns of Different Types into detailed versions
body:
## This pack changes the texture of the Goat Horn According to the Type of Goat Horn into Detailed Versions!
**NO OPTIFINE REQUIRED! Just Vanilla 1.21.5**

![InGame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3936bd2e6b8d76946762fee299683958b733b99b.png)

![In Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc0804b263de18aee9e7d139f2aed8304871d0a7.png)

**How to install:**
- Go to the escape menu and press "Options"
- Then press "Resource Packs"
- In here, press "Open Pack Folder" This should open a folder.
- Drag and drop the resource pack in that folder
- The resource pack should now be available in the menu
